executives.name: Carolyn Handlon
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Treasurer of Marriott International, Inc. Expert in global finance, capital markets, and risk management.

executives.name: Donna Morea
executives.background: Ms. Morea has served as Chair of the Board since 2019. She was previously President of CGI Technologies and Solutions. She is an expert in IT professional services and strategic management.

executives.name: Katharina McFarland
executives.background: Former Assistant Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and former President of the Defense Acquisition University. Expert in defense acquisition and technology.

executives.name: Michael Daniels
executives.background: Mr. Daniels has served as Chairman of the Board since 2021. He was previously Chairman and CEO of Mobile 365 and a senior executive at SAIC.

executives.name: Michelle O’Hara
executives.background: Ms. O’Hara has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer since October 2019. She joined SAIC in 2009 and has held various leadership roles in human resources.

executives.name: Prabu Natarajan
executives.background: Mr. Natarajan has served as our Chief Financial Officer since January 2021. Prior to joining SAIC, he served as Vice President of Financial Planning and Analysis and Mergers and Acquisitions at Northrop Grumman Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Robert Bedingfield
executives.background: Former Senior Partner at Ernst & Young LLP. He has extensive experience in financial reporting, audit, and risk management for major corporations.

tenure_dates.title: Director / Chairman of the Audit Committee

executives.name: Yvette Kanouff
executives.background: Partner and Chief Technology Officer at JC2 Ventures. Former Senior Vice President and General Manager of the Service Provider Business at Cisco Systems.
